message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 25
  BoxPadding 10
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "main" as main
participant "bkup.BackupFacade" as bkup
participant "srcrepo.SourceRepository" as srcrepo
participant "dstrepo.DestinationRepository" as dstrepo
participant "metarepo.MetadataRepository" as metarepo
participant "scanner.AllFileScanner" as scanner
database "FileSystem" as fs
database "SQLite3" as sqlite

main -> bkup : execute()

group Get all files
  bkup -> scanner : get_all_files()
  scanner -> fs
  fs --> scanner
  scanner --> bkup : all_files
end

group Get source files
  bkup -> srcrepo : get_files_matching_criteria(all_files)
  srcrepo --> bkup : src_files
end

group Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files
  bkup -> metarepo : get_uncontained_keys(src_files)
  metarepo -> sqlite : SELECT
  sqlite --> metarepo : result
  metarepo --> bkup : uncontained_keys

  bkup -> metarepo : remove_metadatas(uncontained_keys)
  loop until the generator finishes]
    metarepo -> sqlite : DELETE
    metarepo --> bkup : yield removed_metadata <return value is discarded>
  end
end

group Create backup and update metadata
  bkup -> bkup : _get_backup_list(src_files)
  bkup --> bkup : backup_list

  bkup -> dstrepo : create_backups(backup_list)
  loop until the generator finishes]
    dstrepo -> fs : shutil.copy2(src_file, dst_file)
    dstrepo --> bkup : yield backed_up_src_file
    bkup -> metarepo : update_metadata(backed_up_src_file)
    metarepo -> sqlite : REPLACE INTO
  end
end

group Discard old backups
  bkup -> dstrepo : get_discard_list(today, all_files)
  dstrepo --> bkup : discard_list

  bkup -> dstrepo : remove_backups(discard_list)
  loop until the generator finishes]
    dstrepo -> fs : os.remove(file_to_be_removed)
    dstrepo --> bkup : yield removed_file <return value is discarded>
  end
end

main <-- bkup : return
@enduml
```
